problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Quantum. Quantum annealing for optimization problems directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
